testcase.name: Test1

failure.message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 119 Current browser version is 143.0.7499.194 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Build info: version: '3.141.59', revision: 'e82be7d358', time: '2018-11-14T08:17:03' System info: host: 'DESKTOP-304IM2H', ip: '192.168.1.4', os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.1' Driver info: driver.version: ChromeDriver remote stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00FB72A3+45731] (No symbol) [0x00F42D51] (No symbol) [0x00E3880D] (No symbol) [0x00E61281] (No symbol) [0x00E60A9A] (No symbol) [0x00E5D3C2] (No symbol) [0x00E5A310] (No symbol) [0x00E8EB26] (No symbol) [0x00E8E6BC] (No symbol) [0x00E87DD6] (No symbol) [0x00E631F6] (No symbol) [0x00E6439D] GetHandleVerifier [0x012C0716+3229462] GetHandleVerifier [0x013084C8+3523784] GetHandleVerifier [0x0130214C+3498316] GetHandleVerifier [0x01041680+611968] (No symbol) [0x00F4CCCC] (No symbol) [0x00F48DF8] (No symbol) [0x00F48F1D] (No symbol) [0x00F3B2C7] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x765BFCC9+25] RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x773082AE+286] RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7730827E+238]
